expected_signals.summary: Lovable is reportedly in talks to raise $300 million at a $13.2 billion valuation, with Menlo Ventures expected to lead.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: in talks to raise $300 million at a valuation of $13.2 billion

expected_signals.summary: Lovable reached a $500 million annualized revenue run rate in June.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: hit $500 million in annualized revenue run rate in June

expected_signals.summary: Lovable already counts major enterprises among customers for its vibe-coding tool.

notes: Observable proof is limited to the provided document text via the anchor quotes; there is no separate runnable verifier for this labeling task. Do not treat the financing as closed; the report says the company is in talks.
